calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: B. Fields, CSR #7235.

Howard N. Chung, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Marty Arbunich dba The Eichler Network.
Plaintiff's Witness Marty Arbunich was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Loni Nagwani.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $23,434.52
Attorney Fees - $4,810.50
Costs - $450.00
Total - $28,695.02
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOWARD N. CHUNG OF THE CORPORATE COUNSEL LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 989-5300 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MARTY ARBUNICH'S Motion To Compel Discovery is granted. No opposition filed. $760.00 in sanctions awarded. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
